Generate significance stars for a p-value vector.

Source: R/options.R
dot-p_stars.Rd

Generate significance stars for a p-value vector.

Usage

.p_stars(x, thresholds = c(0.05, 0.01, 0.001))

clerkR — Circadia Lab, Northumbria University. Lucas França.
